feature_importance.reason: Direct citation of CE regulatory authority (516 DM 11.9, Section 390 EPAct 2005, FLPMA 402(h)(1)) is definitional for CE classification; absence or 'nan' values correlate with doc_type=OTHER misclassification within the CE stratum

Routine categories (Rangeland Management, Pipelines in existing corridors, Utilities, Public and Recreational Land Use) map deterministically to CE eligibility; large-scale new construction project types would push to EA/EIS
Keywords like 'Renewal', 'Assignment', 'Transfer', 'Amendment', 'Right-of-Way', 'SRP', 'APD', 'Grazing Lease' are highly predictive of CE pathway; new construction/development terms predict EA/EIS
Oil & gas operators (EOG, Chevron, Mewbourne, Jonah Energy) and utility cooperatives cluster in CE; large federal/industrial developers cluster in EA/EIS

Language patterns ('no new disturbance', 'existing facilities', 'within existing right-of-way', 'less than five acres') are deterministic CE indicators; surface disturbance magnitude language predicts escalation
CE documents median 3-8 pages; EA typically 30-200 pages; EIS 200+ pages. Strong numeric discriminator
Energy Production, Transportation Infrastructure, Agriculture/Rangeland dominate CE; multi-sector complex projects skew to EA/EIS
Within BLM stratum, no discrimination; cross-stratum BLM is heavily CE-biased due to FLPMA authorities and EPAct Section 390
Weak signal; CE actions typically 1-3 supporting docs, EA/EIS bundles 5-15+
Free-text PLSS coordinates have low predictive value for process type; useful only for geographic clustering not CE/EA/EIS lift

noisy_fields.issue: Inconsistent citation formats: '516 DM 11.9', '516 DM 11.9, E (12)', '516 DM 6, Appendix 5.4, E (12)', 'CXAP4_E9', 'H-1790-1 Appendix 4 E9', free-text paraphrases, and literal 'nan'/empty strings all appear. Same underlying CE (e.g., E.9 renewals) cited 8+ different ways
noisy_fields.fix: Intake form should present a controlled picklist of DOI/BLM CE codes keyed by (manual_section, appendix, letter, number) tuple, e.g., CE_CODE='BLM_516DM11.9_E_9'. Require selection from dropdown; free-text only in a separate 'additional_rationale' field

noisy_fields.issue: Values CE, ROD, FONSI, OTHER appear within stratum='CE/BLM'. ROD and FONSI are decision documents that should not co-label a CE; OTHER catches records with missing ce_category (e.g., 87 of 500 records have empty ce_category with doc_type=OTHER)
noisy_fields.fix: Separate fields: process_type (CE/EA/EIS) and decision_document_type (DR/ROD/FONSI/NOA). Enforce referential integrity: if process_type=CE and ce_category is null, reject submission

noisy_fields.issue: Array field with inconsistent ordering, overlapping taxonomy (e.g., 'Land Development and Urban Planning' applied to oil field helicopter pads; 'Miscellaneous and Emerging Technologies' conflated with Research). One record has empty array
noisy_fields.fix: Enforce single primary_sector + multi-select secondary_sectors from a fixed 12-item taxonomy. Add validation rule: Energy projects cannot have 'Land Development - Urban' as primary

noisy_fields.issue: Duplicate entries within same record (e.g., 'Water Resources - Other' appearing twice in one array); near-synonyms like 'Surface Transportation - Other' vs 'Land Development - Other' used interchangeably for access roads
noisy_fields.fix: De-duplicate array on save; merge 'X - Other' buckets into parent category; add explicit 'Access Road' and 'Right-of-Way Renewal' project types as first-class values

noisy_fields.issue: Mixed entity types: private companies ('EOG Resources Incorporated' vs 'EOG Resources, Inc.' vs 'EOG Resources, Inc'), BLM field offices as sponsors, individuals ('Cook', 'Nichols', 'UNK'). No entity ID
noisy_fields.fix: Split into sponsor_type (enum: operator/utility/government/individual/tribe/ngo) + sponsor_entity_id (linked to a normalized entity registry with DUNS/CAGE for corporates); free-text only for display_name

noisy_fields.issue: Highly unstructured: mixes PLSS legal descriptions, lat/long, mailing addresses ('620 E. Greene St. Carlsbad, NM'), vague regional names ('Kramer Junction area'), and one 'UNK'
noisy_fields.fix: Structured fields: meridian, township, range, section (repeatable), state, county, centroid_lat, centroid_lon. Require at least county+state OR centroid coords

noisy_fields.issue: Truncated at ~300 chars; one record literally 'No project description found.'; inconsistent header formatting ('**Description of Proposed Action:**' vs plain text)
noisy_fields.fix: Minimum 200-char validated description with required sections: purpose, location_summary, dimensions_acreage, disturbance_type (new/existing/renewal)

noisy_fields.issue: Not validated against actual attachments; values of 1 page appear for complex multi-well PODs suggesting metadata scraping errors
noisy_fields.fix: Auto-compute from attached PDF bundle at submission; flag records where total_pages < 2 and project_type includes drilling/construction for QA review

dominant_ce_codes: 516 DM 11.9 E.9 (Renewals/assignments of leases, permits, ROWs)
516 DM 11.9 E.12 (ROW grants within compatibly developed ROW corridors)
Section 390 EPAct 2005 b(4) (Pipeline in approved corridor <5yr)
Section 390 EPAct 2005 b(3) (Drilling in developed field)
516 DM 11.9 E.13 (ROW amendments, no new disturbance)
516 DM 11.9 E.19 (Short-term ROW/land use auth, <=3 years)
